requirement_topic.en: OCPP, EMC and Power Quality — Project-Specific Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP、EMC和电能质量——项目特定要求
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP、EMC和電能質量——項目特定要求

summary.en: A national Guinea OCPP mandate for EV chargers could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14. For networked public, fleet, hotel, mining, or donor-funded chargers, OCPP is the practical back-office interoperability expectation if a charge-point operator, fleet platform, or project owner requires remote monitoring, fault reporting, access control, billing, energy reporting, or load management. EMC and power quality should be documented against IEC 61000-family expectations, especially for weak-grid locations where harmonics, voltage dips, surge exposure, and generator or storage interaction can affect site reliability.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认几内亚全国电动汽车充电桩OCPP强制要求。对于联网公共、车队、酒店、矿区或援助资金充电桩，如充电点运营商、车队平台或项目业主要求远程监控、故障报告、访问控制、计费、用电报告或负载管理，OCPP是实际后台互操作预期。EMC和电能质量应按IEC 61000系列预期提供文件，特别是在弱电网地点，谐波、电压暂降、浪涌暴露以及发电机或储能互动可能影响现场可靠性。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認幾內亞全國電動汽車充電樁OCPP強制要求。對於聯網公共、車隊、酒店、礦區或援助資金充電樁，如充電點運營商、車隊平台或項目業主要求遠程監控、故障報告、訪問控制、計費、用電報告或負載管理，OCPP是實際後台互操作預期。EMC和電能質量應按IEC 61000系列預期提供文件，特別是在弱電網地點，諧波、電壓暫降、浪湧暴露以及發電機或儲能互動可能影響現場可靠性。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — back-office communication for networked chargers
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-24 — DC charger digital communication context
Project owner, charge-point operator, mining-site, or fleet platform requirements to be confirmed

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 for communication between the off-board charger and the battery management system. That CAN bus protocol is not a substitute for OCPP back-office communication and does not provide CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 interoperability. China-market chargers may include proprietary cloud platforms or OCPP variants, but those implementations still need project-level validation against the Guinea operator's chosen back office and weak-grid EMC requirements.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023作为非车载充电机与电池管理系统之间的通信协议。该CAN总线协议不能替代OCPP后台通信，也不能提供CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118互操作。中国市场充电桩可能包含私有云平台或OCPP变体，但这些实现仍须针对几内亚运营方选择的后台和弱电网EMC要求进行项目级验证。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023作為非車載充電機與電池管理系統之間的通訊協議。該CAN總線協議不能替代OCPP後台通訊，也不能提供CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118互操作。中國市場充電樁可能包含私有雲平台或OCPP變體，但這些實現仍須針對幾內亞運營方選擇的後台和弱電網EMC要求進行項目級驗證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
China EMC test evidence where available

gap.en: Exporters must confirm whether the Guinea project requires OCPP 1.6J, OCPP 2.0.1, SIM / Ethernet routing, local data hosting, offline operation, remote firmware updates, payment integration, or fleet authorization. For EMC, provide IEC 61000 immunity and emissions evidence, harmonic data, surge protection, filter design, and commissioning measurements for generator-backed or weak-grid sites. A charger with only GB/T 27930 DC communication and no validated OCPP back office is not network-ready.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认几内亚项目是否要求OCPP 1.6J、OCPP 2.0.1、SIM / 以太网路由、本地数据托管、离线运行、远程固件更新、支付集成或车队授权。EMC方面，应提供IEC 61000抗扰度和发射证据、谐波数据、浪涌保护、滤波设计，以及发电机备用或弱电网现场的调试测量。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信且未验证OCPP后台的充电桩不具备联网部署条件。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認幾內亞項目是否要求OCPP 1.6J、OCPP 2.0.1、SIM / 以太網路由、本地數據託管、離線運行、遠程韌體更新、支付集成或車隊授權。EMC方面，應提供IEC 61000抗擾度和發射證據、諧波數據、浪湧保護、濾波設計，以及發電機備用或弱電網現場的調試測量。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊且未驗證OCPP後台的充電樁不具備聯網部署條件。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — OCPP is mandatory where required by the project owner or operator; EMC and power-quality evidence are practical requirements for EDG-connected or weak-grid sites even where a national EVSE rule is unconfirmed
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; it is not OCPP-compatible and cannot substitute for project back-office integration

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Guinea, OCPP is likely a project specification rather than a confirmed national mandate, but networked chargers still need validated back-office integration and IEC 61000 EMC / power-quality evidence for weak-grid sites.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对几内亚而言，OCPP更可能是项目规范而非已确认的全国强制要求，但联网充电桩仍需要验证后台集成，并为弱电网现场提供IEC 61000 EMC / 电能质量证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對幾內亞而言，OCPP更可能是項目規範而非已確認的全國強制要求，但聯網充電樁仍需要驗證後台集成，並為弱電網現場提供IEC 61000 EMC / 電能質量證據。
